title: Authenticity
description: The degree to which a person (or system) regards an object as what it is purported to be.

definitions.definition: The degree to which a person (or system) regards an object as what it is purported to be. Authenticity is judged on the basis of evidence.
definitions.sources:
- [Reference Model for an Open Archival Information System (OAIS), Recommended Practice CCSDS 650.0-M-2, Magenta Book 2012](https://public.ccsds.org/pubs/650x0m2.pdf)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
